summary: P0 login-fix verification — 6/6 targeted assertions PASS. The audit._CHAIN_LOCK deadlock fix (threading.Lock -> asyncio.Lock) is confirmed effective in the live preview environment. Backend is no longer hanging; /api/health returns 200 in ~0.2s; MFA step, TOTP login, refresh-cookie rotation, Google OAuth 503-by-design, and 10-parallel-bad-login concurrency all behave per spec. No full UAT was run.

p0_verification_results.login_step1_mfa_required: PASS. POST /api/auth/login (email+password only) -> 200 with {access_token:'', mfa_required:true, user:{...}}. NOTE: conftest.py monkey-patches requests.post to auto-append TOTP for seeded workforce; the test uses requests.request() to bypass that patch and exercise the real MFA-step contract.
p0_verification_results.login_step2_totp_jwt_and_cookie: PASS. POST /api/auth/login (email+password+TOTP) -> 200, access_token is a valid 3-segment JWT, mfa_required=false. Set-Cookie: nms_rt=...; HttpOnly; Path=/api/auth/refresh; SameSite=Lax all present.
p0_verification_results.refresh_family_rotation: PASS. POST /api/auth/refresh (with nms_rt cookie) -> 200 with fresh JWT access_token in body, refresh_token NOT in body, and a rotated nms_rt cookie in Set-Cookie (new value != old).
p0_verification_results.google_oauth_authorize_503_by_design: PASS. GET /api/auth/google/oauth/authorize -> 503 with detail mentioning 'Direct Google OAuth not configured' — Emergent-managed Google fallback path preserved.
p0_verification_results.concurrency_10_parallel_bad_logins: PASS. 10 concurrent invalid-credential logins all returned 401 within ~1s each (deadlock symptom absent). Pre-fix this would freeze the event loop; post-fix confirmed non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: audit.py: _CHAIN_LOCK is now correctly an asyncio.Lock() with `async with _CHAIN_LOCK:` around the audit_logs insert — RCA fix is in place at /app/backend/audit.py line 111 & 158.

Prior open items (unrelated to this P0) still stand from iter19: (a) POST /api/notes/{id}/amend accepts empty reason, (b) routers/auth.py lines ~905-914 dead code referencing undefined `refresh` in google_oauth_callback, (c) clamscan binary reported missing from container — affects file uploads only. NOT re-tested here per scope.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_p0_login_fix.py (new — 6 targeted regression tests for the P0 audit-lock deadlock fix)
test_credentials: admin@natmedsol.local / Admin!2345, TOTP secret JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXPJBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP (fixture — enrolled via conftest for the 5 seeded workforce accounts).
seed_data_creation: None. Tests only login/refresh against the pre-seeded admin account. No mutations to persistent data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression command (from /app/backend, with .env + PYTHONPATH exported): `pytest tests/test_p0_login_fix.py -v`. Expect 6/6 PASS in ~2.5s. If any test regresses to 502 or timeouts, first check `audit.py::_CHAIN_LOCK` is still `asyncio.Lock()` (not `threading.Lock()`). The concurrency test in particular is the direct regression guard for the fix. Also note: /app/backend/tests/conftest.py auto-appends TOTP to any requests.post to /auth/login for seeded workforce — use `requests.request('POST', ...)` if you need to exercise the raw MFA step-1 contract.
rca_of_the_issue: Original P0: audit.py held a threading.Lock() across `await db.audit_logs.insert_one(...)`. When two coroutines contended, the second blocked on Lock.acquire() inside the running event loop, freezing the entire asyncio loop → every /api call hung → Cloudflare returned 502 Bad Gateway. Fix (verified in this iteration): _CHAIN_LOCK replaced with asyncio.Lock() and `async with _CHAIN_LOCK:` — verified live via 10-parallel bad-login test (all 10 return 401 in <1s, no hangs). All 6 targeted assertions from the review request pass.
